response.overview: A young college student is forced to navigate a life surrounded by violence both at home and on the streets. Struggling to survive in a dangerous environment, she makes a drastic choice — becoming a hit woman to protect herself and endure the hardships around her.  As her life spirals deeper into crime, Lieutenant Marissa Yanez begins searching for her, determined to find and save her younger sister before it is too late.  Caught between survival and redemption, the young woman must decide whether to continue down a path of violence or trust the one person still fighting to bring her back.
response.title: La Niña Sicaria
